name: Richard Adkerson
background: Mr. Adkerson has served as Chairman of the Board since 2021 and Chief Executive Officer since 2003. He has been a director of the company since 2006. He previously served as President from 2008 to 2021 and Chief Financial Officer from 2000 to 2003.

commpanies.name: Freeport-McMoRan Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Chairman, Chairman of the Board, Chief Executive Officer, Director
